findings.title: Maintain current contact details
findings.details: Account contact details are up to date

findings.title: Ensure no root account access key exists
findings.details: No access keys found for root account

findings.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for root account
Ensure IAM password policy requires minimum length of 14
findings.details: Current minimum length is 8, should be 14
findings.remediation: Update IAM password policy: aws iam update-account-password-policy --minimum-password-length 14

findings.title: Ensure multi-factor authentication is enabled for all IAM users with console access
findings.details: 3 IAM users with console access do not have MFA enabled
findings.remediation: Enable MFA for users: svc-payment, svc-etl, dev-ops-user. Use virtual MFA or hardware MFA device.

findings.title: Ensure access keys are rotated every 90 days or less
findings.resource: IAM Users: svc-payment (key age: 147 days), svc-etl (key age: 203 days)
findings.details: 2 access keys are older than 90 days
findings.remediation: Rotate access keys: 1) Create new key, 2) Update applications, 3) Deactivate old key, 4) Delete old key after verification

findings.title: Ensure S3 bucket versioning is enabled
findings.details: Versioning is not enabled on bucket bi-payment-transaction-logs

findings.title: Ensure S3 bucket has server-side encryption enabled
findings.remediation: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS encryption on the bucket

findings.title: Ensure EBS volume encryption is enabled by default
findings.details: EBS encryption by default is not enabled in this region

findings.title: Ensure RDS instances are encrypted
findings.details: RDS instance bi-payment-db does not have encryption at rest enabled
findings.remediation: Create encrypted snapshot, restore from encrypted snapshot, update DNS/connection strings

findings.title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions
Ensure CloudTrail log file validation is enabled
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to port 22
findings.remediation: Restrict SSH access to specific CIDR ranges (e.g., VPN: 10.0.0.0/8) or use SSM Session Manager

findings.title: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to port 3389
findings.details: No security groups allow RDP from any source

findings.title: Ensure VPC flow logging is enabled in all VPCs
findings.details: Flow logging is not enabled for VPC bi-payment-vpc
findings.remediation: aws ec2 create-flow-logs --resource-type VPC --resource-ids vpc-0xyz789 --traffic-type ALL --log-destination-type cloud-watch-logs

findings.title: Ensure routing tables for VPC peering are least access
findings.details: No overly permissive peering routes found
